meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-07-11 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: A steady recovery morning to open the weekend: 6h58 at score 84 off a 22:54 bedtime — a solid night after Thursday's window-topping 8h27. Duration landed 23 minutes under the 7-day average (7h21), but quality held good. The autonomic picture is calm but slightly softened: HRV eased to 37 (−3 vs the previous night, just under the 40 baseline) and RHR held at 54, right on the 7-day average, with morning stress low at 20. The stage mix was light-led — 4h11 of light — with deep at 1h23 and REM at 1h24; only 6 minutes awake. Nights are labeled by the evening they start, so this one sits under Fri 10 (Friday–Saturday). Readiness is good and the body has clearly absorbed the training week. Saturday's plan is the trap-bar deadlift: legs are fresh after two rest-lite days, so load it — just keep an eye on the slightly lower HRV and let the warm-up tell you how much to push.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Postojano jutro oporavka za početak vikenda: 6h58 uz ocjenu 84 i lijeganje u 22:54 — čvrsta noć nakon četvrtkove najduže u razdoblju (8h27). Trajanje je 23 minute ispod 7-dnevnog prosjeka (7h21), ali kvaliteta je ostala dobra. Autonomna slika je mirna, ali blago mekša: HRV se spustio na 37 (−3 u odnosu na prethodnu noć, tik ispod osnovice od 40), a RHR ostao na 54, točno na 7-dnevnom prosjeku, uz nizak jutarnji stres 20. Struktura sna vođena laganim snom — 4h11 — uz duboki san 1h23 i REM 1h24; samo 6 minuta budnosti. Noći se bilježe prema večeri kojom počinju, pa ova stoji pod Pet 10 (petak–subota). Spremnost je dobra i tijelo je očito apsorbiralo trenažni tjedan. Subotnji plan je trap-bar mrtvo dizanje: noge su svježe nakon dva laganija dana, pa natovari — samo pripazi na malo niži HRV i neka ti zagrijavanje kaže koliko forsirati.
